author: @sonakshi_haircare
text: 3 months on @bebodywise Hair Growth Serum roll on and genuinely impressed by the results. The dark patches where I had thinning are visibly filling in with baby hairs. The roll-on applicator is so mess-free compared to dropper serums. Redensyl + Aminexil combo really works! #BeBodywise #HairGrowth #IndianSkincareAddicts

author: @ManMattersCustomer
text: @manmatters_in my order has been stuck in transit for 8 days now. Bluedart tracking shows no movement since Nov 12. This is a 3 month hair kit. Customer care asking me to wait another 3 days every time I call. Please help resolve this urgently.

author: @priyabiotin
text: Okay @bebodywise biotin hair gummies are genuinely life changing for postpartum hair loss. Month 1 I almost gave up. Month 4 and my hairline is filling back in with actual baby hairs. Wish I had started sooner. Strawberry taste is a bonus #PostpartumHairLoss #BeBodywise

author: @skincarecritique_in
text: Just a heads up: @bebodywise Vitamin C serum oxidizes faster than expected if stored incorrectly. Mine turned orange after 6 weeks. Customer care was helpful and replaced it but there should be clearer storage instructions on packaging. This is a known issue with ethyl ascorbic acid formulas. #Skincare

author: @rahul_hairfall
text: 5 months into @manmatters_in hair serum and can finally see the difference. From losing 100+ hairs in shower to maybe 30-40. The baby hairs are real. Consistency is key with this stuff - don't give up before 3 months! #ManMatters #HairGrowth #MensHealth

author: @BiotinBreakoutAlert
text: IMPORTANT: if you're acne prone and considering @bebodywise or any brand's biotin gummies - read this. High dose biotin depletes vitamin B5 which is key for skin health. This caused cystic acne for me along my jawline. I've seen others report this too. Take supplemental B5 with it or use lower dose. Not blaming the brand but a disclaimer would help. #BeBodywise #BiotinSideEffects

author: @wellnessreview_in
text: Comparing @bebodywise vs @manmatters_in hair serums after trying both for 3 months each. Both genuinely reduce hair fall. Be Bodywise = better results for women pattern thinning. Man Matters = better for male pattern thinning. Price is similar. Either way you're getting real actives not just botanical extracts. #HairGrowth #IndianWellness

author: @frustrated_subscriber
text: @manmatters_in AGAIN charged my account after I cancelled subscription in June. This is the SECOND time. Raised ticket 3 days ago no response. Tagging publicly because private support is not working. Refund my money please. #ConsumerRights

author: @bebodywisefan
text: The @bebodywise Ultra Light Sunscreen SPF50 is the only sunscreen I've tried with zero white cast on NC45 skin. Korean AcZero technology actually works for my acne prone skin. Been using 8 months no breakouts. Will never switch. #Sunscreen #BeBodywise #IndianSkincare

author: @QualityWatch_IN
text: Heads up: Multiple users including myself noticing @manmatters_in hair serum consistency varies between batches. My last order was significantly runnier than before. Hair fall actually got worse after switching to the new batch. QC issue? Anyone else? #ManMatters #ProductQuality

author: @pricematters_in
text: Love @bebodywise products but the price hike on hair gummies is unreal. Was Rs 650 for 30 days pack now it's Rs 899. I get that inflation hits everyone but a 38% increase in 18 months is a lot. Still buying because it works but hoping they introduce a budget tier. #BeBodywise

author: @labtestedIN
text: Ran the @bebodywise sunscreen through an informal SPF test with UV sensitive paper. Protection is real but seemed slightly lower than 50 SPF labeled. This is common across many Indian sunscreen brands. Formula is excellent and I'd still recommend it. Just be realistic about outdoor protection times. #Sunscreen #SPF #IndianSkincare

author: @divya_garg_wellness
text: 1 year @bebodywise check-in. Still on the biotin gummies and hair serum. Hair density is the best it's been in 5 years. For anyone who's given up after 2 months - please give it 6. The change from month 3 onwards is real. Worth every rupee. #BeBodywise #HairCare #LongReview

author: @ManMattersComplaint
text: @manmatters_in ordered a 3 month hair kit in Jan. Received only 2 of 3 products. Support team asked me to submit unboxing video which I don't have. No resolution after 3 weeks. Disputed with my credit card. This missing product issue seems to come up repeatedly. Needs fixing urgently.

author: @IndianWellnessReview
text: @bebodywise rosemary hair serum is genuinely one of the best D2C hair products of 2024. 3% Rosemary + 3% Redensyl + 2% Anagain is a powerhouse combo. 4 months in and baby hairs are very visible now. My dermatologist confirmed this is among the better D2C hair growth formulas available in India.
